name: OAMC Tips
recipeInstructions:
1. Consider purchasing some rubbermaid/tupperware containers for storing your ingredients and meals.
2. Use zip-top freezer bags to store most of your food items. These are inexpensive, especially when on sale, and can be reused after washing them out. Note that they may deteriorate after a few uses.
3. For layered casseroles and lasagnes, spray a 9x13" pan with cooking spray, line it with foil, assemble the dish, freeze it in the pan until solid, then remove it from the pan and wrap it well with foil for storage. On cooking day, borrow a 9x13" pan from family or friends to avoid using your own pans during freezing.
from the Frozen Assets List
